name: Liverwurst Latvian
long_description:
DON Latvian Style Liverwurst is made to the original Latvian recipe with a perfect blend of herbs and spices. Great for entertaining, this tasty pork liver spread is also an easy way to add texture to your snacks and work sandwiches. Pair with mustard and some pickled cucumbers for a tangy kick of flavour.
  • Authentic Latvian style recipe

  • Tasty sandwich filling or on biscuit for easy snack

  • Fine texture perfect for spreading

name: Chicken Frankfurt
long_description:
Make Everyday Primo!
Primos iconic Chicken Frankfurt's are perfect for any occasion in a convenient family sized pack!

To heat, bring a large saucepan of water to a gentle simmer. Add Chicken Frankfurts and simmer for 3-5 minutes or until warmed through.

Enjoy Primos Chicken Franks by themselves or serve with fresh bread rolls, tomato sauce, mustard & chopped onion.

name: Fresh Tasmanian Salmon Portions Skin On
description: COLES DELI FRESH TASMANIAN SALMON PORTIONS SKIN ON
long_description:
COMMITTED TO GOOD THINGS At Coles, we care about how the seafood we sell is sourced and produced. When sourcing our seafood we recognise a range of certification and assessment programs. For farmed (aquaculture) seafood Coles Own Brand products must be certified by: Aquaculture Stewardship Council (ASC); Best Aquaculture Practices (BAP); or GLOBALG.A.P. This Atlantic salmon has been raised in the cool waters of Tasmania and is carefully selected for its quality and freshness.

LOOKING FOR INSPIRATION Rich in Omega-3 fatty acids, Salmon Portions provide a versatile and healthy meal solution. For a quick and nutritious dinner simply pan fry and serve with green salad, cooked brown or whole grain rice, a squeeze of lemon juice and herb butter. TIP Rest the Salmon Portions for 1 minute prior to serving to allow the natural juices in the fish to disperse evenly.
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Tasmanian Farmed Atlantic Salmon (Salmo salar) (Fish).

name: Frozen Basa Fillets
long_description:
I&J Basa Fillets 750g brings you a versatile and delicious seafood option, perfect for any kitchen creation. Responsibly sourced, our basa fillets offer a mild flavour and firm texture that adapts seamlessly to your favourite cooking techniques. Whether you're baking, pan-frying, or preparing a flavourful curry, these fillets are an excellent choice for a comforting family dinner or an impressive meal to share with friends.
Every bite of I&J Basa Fillets embodies the pure essence of the sea and is delivered with care.

- Good source of protein
- Filleted by hand
- Versatile to suit any meal

At I&J we have a rich fishing heritage. Our passion for quality seafood goes back over 100 years, and our history on the seas has given us a deep understanding of the ocean and waterways. We offer a wide selection of responsibly sourced fish and seafood, as we aim to bring you only the finest catch.

I&J Flathead Fillets 500g serves up a seafood delight that's perfect for any meal. Responsibly sourced, our flathead fillets offer a delicate, yet flavourful taste and a firm, flaky texture that adapts beautifully to your preferred cooking style. Whether you're pan-frying, baking, or adding them to a hearty fish chowder, these fillets are the ideal choice for a relaxed family meal or a culinary treat to share with friends. Every bite of I&J Flathead Fillets captures the pure essence of the ocean and is crafted with care.

- Good source of Omega 3 and protein
- Ideal for pan-frying, baking, or creating delicious seafood dishes
- Versatile to suit any meal

At I&J we have a rich fishing heritage. Our passion for quality seafood goes back over 100 years, and our history on the seas has given us a deep understanding of the ocean and waterways. We offer a wide selection of responsibly sourced fish and seafood, as we aim to bring you only the finest catch.

name: Scallops Roe Off
long_description:
I&J Roe Off Scallops 300g deliver a premium seafood experience that's perfect for showcasing the delicate flavours of the sea. Responsibly sourced and expertly prepared, our scallops have been carefully processed to remove the roe, ensuring a pure, tender texture with every bite. Whether you're grilling, pan-searing, or tossing them into a refreshing salad, these scallops bring a refined taste of the ocean to any dish. Every mouthful of I&J Roe Off Scallops captures the genuine essence of the sea - free from artificial preservatives, colours, and flavours, ensuring that you enjoy only the finest quality seafood.

- Thaw and cook before consumption
- Ideal for grilling, pan-searing, or incorporating into gourmet salads and pasta dishes
- No artificial preservatives, colours, and flavours

At I&J we have a rich fishing heritage. Our passion for quality seafood goes back over 100 years, and our history on the seas has given us a deep understanding of the ocean and waterways. We offer a wide selection of responsibly sourced fish and seafood, as we aim to bring you only the finest catch.

name: Australian Thawed Raw Extra Large Black Tiger Prawns
description: COLES DELI AUSTRALIAN THAWED RAW EXTRA LARGE BLACK TIGER PRAWNS
long_description:
LOOKING FOR INSPIRATIONQuick and simple to cook this prawn meat makes the perfect addition to any seafood dish. They make for tasty snacks when pan fried and tossed through garlic butter or sweet chilli sauce and make the perfect summer meal when skewered and cooked on searing hot BBQ. Whichever way you like to cook yours we recommend a generous squeeze of fresh lemon juice to complement any prawn dish.

name: Pitted Kalamata Olives
long_description:
Coles Deli Express Pitted Kalamata Olives 300g.





  • Pitted kalamata olives

  • Product of Greece

  • No artificial colours and flavours




Coles Deli Express range helps you entertain your guests in style. These delicious Coles Deli Express Pitted Kalamata Olives are a classic Greek table variety with a full flavour and smooth, meaty texture. They have been pitted so they're perfect to pop into your salads and cooking, or can be enjoyed straight from the pack.




Coles Deli Express Pitted Kalamata Olives work well in a range of dishes, particularly those from the Mediterranean. Create a traditional Greek salad with sliced cucumbers, tomatoes, red onion, and feta cheese or add to chickpea and couscous. they're also fantastic tossed through pasta. A classic way to enjoy Coles Deli Express Pitted Kalamata Olives is in an olive tapenade. Simply blend olives with parsley, capers, lemon, and garlic. Add some anchovies and chilli powder if you like. Then serve with crackers and crusty bread, or add to crushed tomatoes for a sensational pizza sauce.
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Kalamata Olives (60%), Water, Salt, Vinegar.
country_of_origin: Made in Australia from less than 10% Australian ingredients

name: Mixed Mediterranean Olives
long_description:
Coles Deli Express Mixed Mediterranean Olives 300g





  • Mediterranean olive medley

  • Marinated in oil

  • No artificial colours and flavours.




Coles Deli Express range helps you entertain your guests in style. These Coles Deli Express Mixed Mediterranean Olives feature a medley of classic olive varieties that are full of flavour. They have been pitted so they're perfect to pop into salads and cooking, or can be enjoyed straight from the pack.




Coles Deli Express Mixed Mediterranean Olives pair well with a range of dishes, particularly Greek-style salads. They make a delicious addition to chickpea and couscous recipes and they're fantastic tossed through classic Italian pastas. When it comes to cheese boards and grazing platters, olives are a must. Plate up alongside semi-dried tomatoes, a variety of cheese, and some fresh or pickled veges. Or why not make a classic olive tapenade with a blend of Coles Deli Express Mixed Mediterranean Olives, capers, lemon, garlic, anchovies and olive oil? Then serve with crostini and crackers or slices of toasted baguette.

Coles Deli Express Stuffed Green Olives in Chilli and Garlic 300g





  • Stuffed green olives

  • In garlic and chilli oil

  • No artificial colours and flavours




Coles Deli Express range helps you entertain your guests in style. These Coles Deli Express Stuffed Green Olives in Chilli and Garlic are packed with flavour and marinated in infused oil. They make a fantastic addition to any cheese platter for easy entertaining and casual get-togethers.




Coles Deli Express Stuffed Green Olives in Chilli and Garlic can be enjoyed straight from the pack and they're perfect for adding a punch of flavour to your salads and cooking. Try tossing them through classic Italian pastas or adding them to Greek-style dishes. For a traditional charcuterie board, plate up Coles Deli Express Stuffed Green Olives in Chilli and Garlic alongside tasty bites, like semi-dried tomatoes and stuffed baby bell peppers. Add a variety of cheeses and cured meat to complete the board, then serve with crackers and crusty bread.

name: Semi Dried Tomatoes With Basil
description: COLES DELI SEMI DRIED TOMATOES WITH BASIL 300G
long_description:
Coles Deli Express Semi-Dried Tomatoes with Basil 300g





  • Semi-dried tomatoes

  • Made in Australia

  • No artificial colours and flavours




Coles Deli Express Semi-Dried Tomatoes are deliciously plump with an intense tomato taste that adds a burst of flavour to your dishes. Marinated in basil and garlic and topped with fresh herbs, they're a convenient way to jazz up salads and sides.




Coles Deli Express Semi-Dried Tomatoes are made in Australia from premium Australian tomatoes. These homegrown gems are selected for quality then semi dried to retain some moisture and intensify their flavour. The result is a slightly sweet, slightly juicy addition to elevate any dish. And they don't just taste great, they're also packed with goodness and have a 4-star health rating.




Add Coles Deli Express Semi-Dried Tomatoes to pasta salads or scatter over homemade pizzas. they're great for adding to deli-style sandwiches along with rocket and sliced mozzarella and they're a colourful addition to grazing platters and charcuterie boards.

name: Gluten Free Wafer Crackers
long_description:
At OB Finest, we believe in quality without compromise, offering entertainers a refined, sophisticated touch that will please any connoisseur. Our range helps you create memorable experiences marked with your signature flair. Savour the subtle elegance of our Wafer Crackers, masterfully crafted with a light, delicate texture that enhances, not overshadows, your flavour experience.

Light and crispy OB Finest Original Gluten Free Wafer Crackers are the perfect accompaniment to your cheese or charcuterie platter for any entertaining or social occasion.

Curate your tablescape with OB Finest Original Gluten Free Wafer Crackers which are perfect paired with Grilled Prawn, Zesty Mayo & Salsa.


Dinner Parties, Birthdays, Festive Entertaining, Christmas, New Years, Easter, Spring Carnival, Mother's Day, Father's Day... whatever the occasion, OB Finest Wafer Crackers are the perfect pairing for your cheese platter or charcuterie board.

Or why not indulge in the delicious flavour combinations at any time of the year, accompanied by cheese, cold meats, olives, pickles, fruit paste, fresh fruit, dips and honey, or enjoy the unique texture and flavour of OB Finest Artisan Biscuits all by themselves.
  • Gluten Free

  • Delicious Original Gluten Free Wafer Crackers

  • Light & Crispy

  • Perfect with Grilled Prawn, Zesty Mayo & Salsa

  • Perfect for Entertaining

  • Australian Made.

name: Duck Orange Pate
long_description:
Treat yourself to indulgent flavour with Maggie Beer's Duck & Orange Pate.

This French-style pate is made with premium, 100% natural ingredients, and has an earthy, rich flavour with a light finish on the palate. A full flavoured pate perfect to serve as an appetiser when entertaining or as a special treat for yourself, spooned straight from the tub onto freshly toasted bread.

Maggie's tip: serve your pate pot on ice to keep chilled.

name: Apricot & Macadamia Crackers
long_description:
At OB Finest, we believe in quality without compromise, offering entertainers a refined, sophisticated touch that will please any connoisseur. Our range helps you create memorable experiences marked with your signature flair. Our Specialty Crackers are masterfully crafted with the finest ingredients to elevate your entertaining experience through blends of flavours and crisp textures.

Packed with Apricot, Macadamia and crunchy seeds, OB Finest Apricot & Macadamia Specialty Crackers are the perfect accompaniment to your cheese or charcuterie platter for any entertaining or social occasion.

Curate your tablescape with OB Finest Apricot & Macadamia Crackers which are perfect paired with Ashed Goats Cheese & Caramelised Peach.

Dinner Parties, Birthdays, Festive Entertaining, Christmas, New Years, Easter, Spring Carnival, Mother's Day, Father's Day... whatever the occasion, OB Finest Specialty Crackers are the perfect pairing for your cheese platter or charcuterie board.

Or why not indulge in the delicious flavour combinations at any time of the year, accompanied by cheese, cold meats, olives, pickles, fruit paste, fresh fruit, dips and honey, or enjoy the unique texture and flavour of OB Finest Artisan Biscuits all by themselves.
  • Delicious Apricot & Macadamia Specialty Crackers

  • Packed with Apricot & Macadamia

  • Perfect with Ashed Goats Cheese & Caramelised Peach

  • Perfect for Entertaining

  • Australian Made

Using the finest Australian milk to make our fresh cow's milk cheese, we then stir in premium local honey and salt to create the unique salty, yet sweet Salted Honey Cow.

Perfect for using at home on a cheeseboard, baked into your favourite cheesecake, whipped and dolloped on waffles or pancakes or the perfect topping for toasted fruit bread, you won't look back once you've tried this unique, moreish cheese. 
  • A creamy fresh cow's milk cheese with honey and salt

  • Made in Australia

  • Using Beechworth Honey

long_description: Roaring Forties is a full flavoured blue with a rich mouthfeel and sweet, slightly fruity character. Delicious on its own, or enjoy as a part of a platter with other King Island Dairy cheeses.

name: Blue Cheese
long_description:
Made from cow's milk in the Auvergne region of France in the village of Beauzac, this modern cheese was developed from an old monastery recipe as a creamy cow's milk alternative to Roquefort.
Milk is collected from farms within an 80km radius of the dairy, with the average size of the herd around just 80 cows. Cows graze at an altitude of over 800m on pastures dotted with wild flowers.
After three months maturation, the cheese develops a rich creamy texture and distinctive blue flavour. 
  • Creamy Blue Cheese

  • Soft & Creamy Texture

  • Made in the Auvergne region in France

  • Made with milk from local farms in the area

  • Mild and Creamy Blue flavour

  • Perfect addition to a cheese board.

  • Perfect portion size for single serving use.

  • Clam packaging is great for storage.
ingredients: Pasteurised Cow's Milk, Salt, Bacterial Cultures, Animal Rennet, Penicillium Roqueforti

name: Halloumi
long_description: Aphrodite Halloumi is one of the few examples of halloumi still formed into pockets by hand, the traditional old-fashioned way. It is hand-crafted in Cyprus from a combination of goat's and ewe's milk. Ewe's milk is high in fat, which causes a delicious brown crust to form when the cheese is grilled or fried, while the goat's milk provides a firm yet elastic texture, and a subtle lingering lemony tang.

name: Traditional Ricotta
description: LA CASA DEL FORMAGGIO TRADITIONAL RICOTTA PER KG
long_description:
This ricotta is ideal for cooking lasagna, cannelloni, stuffed peppers and many more hot cheesy dishes. It also is great for making cannoli, cheesecakes, pies, tarts and other sweet dishes.

Traditional Ricotta is soft and creamy with a delicate texture and pleasant slight caramel flavour. This Ricotta is firmer than our tub variations. This makes it ideal for cooking at higher temperatures as it will not release as much moisture when exposed to high temperatures in the cooking process.

name: Quiche Lorraine
long_description:
Fresh eggs, cream, cheese & milk are combined to make a delicious filling.  We finish this with real Bacon, all encrusted in golden short crust pastry.  

With 45 years of tradition in baking, Hawken Bakehouse is an all Australian family run business.  From the beginning our philosophy was simple, we use fresh locally sourced produce wherever we can to make wholesome food.  Hedy's Quiche is one of the few quiches made using fresh egg, cream, cheese and milk sourced directly from farmers and producers.  The best products start with the best ingredients.

With 45 years of tradition in baking, Hawken Bakehouse is an all Australian family run business.  From the beginning our philosophy was simple, we use fresh locally sourced produce wherever we can to make wholesome food.  Hedy's Quiche is one of the few quiches made using fresh egg, cream, cheese and milk sourced directly from farmers and producers.  The best products start with the best ingredients.

name: Vermicelli Bean Noodles
long_description: Double Phoenix Longkow Vermicelli Bean Thread, also known as glass noodles, are chewy and translucent noodles that are made with starch. It can be used for salads, stir-fries and soups by soaking the bean thread noodles in hot water until soften or to create a deep fried dish by deep-frying the bean thread noodles in oil until it expands. It is a versatile ingredient that you should always stock in your kitchen.

description: EAZII SHENG JIAN BAO (PAN-FRIED PORK BUN) 360G
long_description:
Bring the delicious street food experience home with EAZII Pan-Fried Pork Buns. Also well-known as Sheng Jian Bao, these buns are filled with juicy, seasoned pork and feature a crispy, golden bottom paired with a soft, fluffy top.
Made in Australia from high-quality ingredients, Eazii Sheng Jian Bao offers an authentic taste of Shanghai-style dim sum. Perfect for a quick snack or an appetizer, they are easy to prepare, just pan-fry to achieve the perfect combination of textures. Enjoy the savoury pork filling and crisp, pan-fried crust in every bite.

Contains flavour enhancers and preservatives.

name: Udon Noodles
long_description:
Indulge in the rich flavours of Japan,
  • Traditional wheat-based udon noodles perfect for stir-fries, salads, and soups;
  • Versatile and hearty noodles with a satisfying chewy texture;
  • Made in Japan for an authentic dining experience;
  • 99% fat free;

    Introducing Obento Udon Noodles 200g, a beloved staple of Japanese cuisine renowned for its comforting flavour and satisfying texture. Made from high-quality wheat flour, these noodles are thicker and chewier than other varieties, making them ideal for a wide range of dishes. Made in Japan, Obento Udon Noodles uphold the traditions of Japanese cuisine while offering convenience and ease of use. Elevate your culinary creations with the authentic taste of Obento Udon Noodles.

    Whether you're crafting a hearty stir-fry, refreshing salad, or soul-warming soup, Obento Udon Noodles are the perfect choice. Their versatility and ability to absorb flavours make them a favourite among home cooks and professional chefs alike. Ready in 3 minutes for soup or stir fry.
ingredients: Wheat Flour, Water, Modified Tapioca Starch (1420), Salt, Acidity Regulators (lactic acid, sodium lactate, glucono-delta-lactone).

long_description: 4 Pines Japanese lager is a modern take on a dry rice lager. It starts easy and finishes even easier with incredible balance, poise, and nothing to hide behind. A base of Pilsner malt and flaked rice provide and ultra-light bodied and coloured beer. A hint of residual sweetness is balanced out by a subtle herbal bite from a dash of hops, results in a dry, crisp and refreshing finish that'll have you reaching for another glass.

name: Panko Bread Crumbs
long_description:
For those seeking the perfect crispy coating,
  • Light texture for a crunchy coating;
  • Ideal for coating chicken, meat, and seafood;

    Introducing Obento Panko Breadcrumbs 200g, the secret ingredient to achieving perfectly crispy and crunchy dishes. With its light texture, these breadcrumbs provide an irresistible coating that locks in flavour and ensures a satisfying crunch with every bite.

    Transform your favourite meats and seafood into delectable delights with Obento Panko Breadcrumbs. Whether you're frying up chicken cutlets or breaded fish fillets, these breadcrumbs will elevate your dishes to new heights of deliciousness.

    Preparation:
    1. Coat meat or seafood in plain flour.
    2. Dip into a mixture of beaten egg, 2-3 tablespoons water and½ teaspoon salt.
    3. Roll in Obento Panko Breadcrumbs.
    4. Deep fry in hot oil until golden brown.
ingredients: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Yeast, Salt, Glucose, Antioxidant (300).

name: Mayonnaise
long_description:
KEWPIE MAYONNAISE is ideal to use on salads, sushi rools, fish and seafood or as a sandwich spread.

Made with egg yolks as opposed to whole eggs with specially blended vinegar, Kewpie Mayonnaise offers a smoother and creamier texture than many other types of mayonnaise. It is also a highly versatile product that opens up a wide range of possibilities in cooking, from drizzling onto Okonomiyaki (Japanese Pancake), dipping with deep-fried dishes to mixing into a nice, creamy potato salad.
ingredients: Refined Soybean Oil, Egg Yolk (9.5%), Distilled Vinegar, Salt, Rice Vinegar, Water, Flavour Enhancer (621), Spices (Contains Mustard), Antioxidant (385).

name: Sushi Seasoning
long_description:
For sushi enthusiasts aiming for authentic flavour,
  • Integral part of making traditional Japanese sushi rice
  • Adds a sticky, sweet taste to sushi rice with a pleasing aftertaste
  • Can be used as a salad dressing without adding oil

    Introducing Obento Sushi Seasoning 250mL, the key ingredient to achieving the perfect balance of flavours in traditional Japanese sushi rice. This specially crafted seasoning adds a sticky, sweet taste to the rice, enhancing its texture and providing a pleasing aftertaste that complements the delicate flavours of raw fish.

    Obento Sushi Seasoning goes beyond sushi rice and can also be used as a salad dressing without the need for additional oil. Its versatility makes it a handy condiment to have in your kitchen, allowing you to effortlessly elevate the flavour of your favourite salads and sushi creations.

    No Artificial Colours, Flavours or Preservatives Added.

name: Cooking Sake
long_description:
For culinary enthusiasts seeking authentic Japanese flavours,
  • Essential ingredient for enhancing the taste of meat, fish, and vegetables;
  • Rice-based cooking sake, a staple of Japanese cuisine;
  • Versatile for cooking or creating delicious dipping sauces;
  • Gluten Free;
  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours or Preservatives Added;

    Introducing Obento Cooking Sake 250ml, your secret weapon for adding extra flavour to your favourite dishes. Made from high-quality rice, this cooking sake is a staple of Japanese cooking and is perfect for elevating the taste of meat, fish, and vegetables.

    Usage Tips:
  • Use Obento Cooking Sake to add depth and complexity to stir-fries, marinades, and sauces.
  • Create a tasty dipping sauce by combining Obento Cooking Sake with Obento Mirin Seasoning and Obento Japanese Soy.

name: Japanese Gin 700ml
long_description:
In Japanese, Roku translates as the number six. Inside every bottle of Roku Gin, you will find six very special botanicals that are sourced in Japan. These represent Suntory's commitment to only use the best ingredients harvested from the best growing areas in Japan. Every aspect of Roku Gin is crafted by Japanese artisans with a centuries-old tradition of meticulous attention to detail.

Not only are Roku Gin's ingredients of the highest quality, many are also uniquely Japanese and, therefore, best understood by Japanese artisans. Suntory's mastery of this process is the result of extensive experience gained over decades making gin. Suntory developed its own multiple distillation process as a result of the special features each botanical brings to Roku Gin's perfectly balanced mix.

  • Gin crafted with six Japanese botanicals

  • Made in tune with the best of every season in Japan

  • Each botanical is harvested at the peak of its ripeness

  • Fruity floral notes of cherry blossom & green tea
ingredients: A journey through the four seasons with six Japanese botanicals: Sakura flower, Sakura leaf, Yuzu peel, Sencha tea (green tea), Gyokuro tea (refined green tea) and Sansh pepper. Cultivated over four seasons, the six botanicals have been carefully selected to create Roku. Each botanical has been harvested at the peak of its season to extract the best flavor, and distilled to fully embody the blessings of nature. Eight traditional botanicals are added to add an authentic gin taste, they include juniper berries, coriander, angelica seed and root, cinnamon, cardamom, bitter orange and lemon peel.

name: Sushi Rice
long_description: Obento Sushi Rice is a fine selection of quality short grain white rice. It is perfect for making sushi due to its stickiness when cooked. It is packed to retain moisture to allow a soft, chewy yet firm texture making it ideal for any other Japanese cuisines.

KEWPIE Deep-Roasted Sesame Dressing is the perfect match for a variety of ingredients, including vegetables, meat, fish, tofu, and noodles.
No MSG Added.

name: Mirin Seasoning
long_description:
For culinary enthusiasts seeking a touch of sweetness in their dishes,
  • Adds a mild sweetness to a variety of Japanese recipes;
  • Perfect for teriyaki, sukiyaki, tempura, grills, and other Japanese dishes;
  • Enhances the flavour profile of your favourite recipes;

    Introducing Obento Mirin Seasoning 250mL, your go-to ingredient for imparting a delightful sweetness to your culinary creations. Whether you're preparing teriyaki chicken, sukiyaki beef, crispy tempura, or grilled delights, Obento Mirin Seasoning is the perfect addition to elevate the flavours of your Japanese-inspired dishes.

    With its versatile usage and mild sweetness, Obento Mirin Seasoning is a must-have in any kitchen. Add depth and complexity to your cooking and indulge in the authentic flavours of Japanese cuisine with Obento Mirin Seasoning.

    No Artificial Colours or Flavours Added.
ingredients: Glucose Syrup, Fructose Syrup, Water, Fermented Rice Seasoning, Soy Sauce (Contains Water, Soybean, Wheat, Sugar, Preservative (211)), Vinegar, Preservative (202, 211).

name: Thai Green Curry
long_description:
Coconut milk balances the green chilli and Thai flavours of this traditional dish. Just add Meat & Vegetables.

Green thai curry
As its essence is a zesty blend of green herbs and spices, when added to coconut milk delivers silky notes of delicate sweet heat. Toss through your choice of crunchy greens and chicken until cooked, but only to perfection. Is it ready yet? Almost! Serve over steaming fragrant rice and top with wedges of lime and Thai herbs. So whether eaten at one of the eclectic stalls sprinkled across the night streets of Thailand or delivered in ornate bowls to an exotic and private setting, this meal will have you only wanting more. When you find yourself reminiscing, take our Thai Green Curry and make it your own.
It's all in the production; we only suggest that you cook with joy!

name: Thai Green Curry Cooking Kit
description: MARION'S KITCHEN THAI GREEN CURRY COOKING KIT 419G
long_description: Enjoy a harmonious blend of Thai flavours in this simple-to follow, quick and easy green curry kit from Marion's Kitchen. Made with all-natural ingredients and no nasties, this gluten-free recipe brings vibrancy and convenience to the dinner table. Simply add fresh meat, seafood or vegetables to the ready-to-use curry paste and coconut cream, then bring on the crunch with delicious bamboo shoots. Traditional dried herbs and chillies round off the flavour. Follow the tips to make the end result mild or hot to suit your own preference.

seeds, cumin seeds, kaffir lime peel.

name: Lemongrass
long_description:
Lemon Grass is one of the most essential Thai herbs used in many Thai dishes ie curries and soups such as the popular Tom Yum or Tom Kha. Its versatility makes it suitable for marinated and barbecued dishes as well as adding to the traditional Thai salads such as Thai Prawn Salad. As a juice it is one of the most popular refreshing drinks served in restaurants and made at home.
No artificial preservatives or colouring added.
ingredients: Lemongrass (50%), water, acidity regulator (330).

name: Pad Thai
long_description:
A harmony of punchy flavours perfectly balanced to complement your choice of ingredients. Delicious with seafood or vegetables.

You would hardly believe the convoluted story behind the most popular of Thailand's street cuisines. It starts with political affiliations, ties to national unification, ambiguous and contested beginnings and finishing in the forefront. Seriously!

And who could resist? From the fragrant calls for a hot-fired wok working a night market stall or an up market restaurant; it's just packed with sensory delights that result in one of the most popular and flavoursome meals Thailand has on offer.

name: Thai Red Curry
description: THE SPICE TAILOR THAI RED CURRY 275G
long_description:
Thai Red Curry

Our Thai red curry is made with flavourful and spicy red chillies, Thai aromatics and simple spices, all held in perfect balance with creamy coconut milk. It is deliciously moreish and a real crowd pleaser.

Spice Routes
A cuisine is a complex tapestry of people, geography and history. Early travellers indelibly influenced South East Asian food with their introduction of spices, chillies and curries. New dishes were created and old ones evolved to give us a whole new spectrum of delicious spiced favourites.

At The Spice Tailor, we have been on our own journey down these old spice routes to explore these delicious cuisines. Our old mandate that all our food must taste authentic and be cooked in the same way they are at home still holds. We are really proud to introduce you to our new range of authentic curries!

This pack contains a pouch of spices and aromatics, a smaller pouch with our spice paste and a larger one with a coconut sauce.



Serves 2-3 in 10 minutes.

No artificial preservatives, colouring or flavourings!

- Medium.
- No nasties.
- Vegetarian.
ingredients: Coconut Cream (44%), Water, Garlic, Lemon Grass (2%), Sunflower Oil, Raw Sugar, Galangal Root (1%), Sweet Basil (1%), Salt, Dry Spices, Kaffir Lime Leaves, Sugar, Coriander, Soy Sauce [Water, SOYABEANS, WHEAT, Salt], Rice Flour, Shallot Powder, Colour: Paprika Oleoresin.
allergens:

May Contain Milk, Peanut, Sesame, Sulphites

name: Soup Of The Day Thai Style Chicken Soup
description: HEINZ SOUP OF THE DAY THAI STYLE CHICKEN SOUP 430G
long_description:
Heinz Soup of the Day Thai Style Chicken with Chilli and Lime Soup is made with quality ingredients including coconut cream, green curry paste, shredded chicken and a mixture of vegetables. It contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives and is a great choice for weeknight dinners. Heinz Soup of the Day Thai Style Chicken with Chilli and Lime Soup is an easy way to enjoy delicious Thai style flavour at home or on-the-go. Add some noodles or serve with rice for a tasty last-minute dinner, or simply top with fresh herbs and a squeeze of lime. Heinz Soup of the Day range captures cafe taste fresh in foil and is quick to heat on the stove or in the microwave.
  • Heinz Soup of the Day Thai Style Chicken with Chilli and Lime

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • Thai style flavoured soup

  • Take away and enjoy at home or at work

  • Easy to heat on the stovetop or in the microwave

name: Cup A Soup Thai Red Curry Serves 2
description: CONTINENTAL CAS ASIAN SOUP Q2S:THAI RED CURRY:.:60 GRAM
long_description:
At Continental we partner with our Australian farmers to grow all of the wheat used in the flour for our noodles sustainably - growing our sustainable wheat in a way which minimises water and fertiliser use, protecting the biodiversity of the land and reducing energy consumption and waste. It's not only good for the planet but tastes great! Continental has been a part of Australian homes since the 1950s, when we first launched our iconic Chicken Noodle Soup. Since then, we have been consistently delivering Australians the soups they know and love. Our Continental products are made with carefully selected ingredients. All of our vegetables, herbs and spices are grown in the field, ripened in the sun, and harvested in season - when they taste their best. Next, these ingredients are dried, which is the oldest known way of preserving food. At Continental, we've always prided ourselves on the quality of what we produce, from sourcing the best quality ingredients to putting passionate and talented chefs in our kitchens. Now we're bringing this same passion for quality to our quest for sustainability, because food grown responsibly simply tastes better. This means reducing water consumption to produce our crops and protecting the environment and biodiversity in the areas surrounding our farms. Go to http://continental.com.au/ to find our full range of flavours such as vegetable soup, instant noodles, classic chicken soup, laksa soup, meaty soup, French onion soup, and more quick soup recipes.
  • Made in our Australian factory

  • Free from artificial colours and flavours.

  • Made with flour from 100% Sustainably Grown Australian Wheat.

  • 3.5 Health Star Rating

  • Just add boiling water

  • Flavour to feel good about.

name: Thai Stir Fry Carrot Green Beans Broccoli Baby Corn & Bamboo Shoots Mix
description: BIRDS EYE THAI STIR FRY CARROT GREEN BEANS BROCCOLI BABY CORN & BAMBOO SHOOTS MIX 500 GRAM
long_description:
Birds Eye Stir Fry Thai 500g - your vibrant shortcut to a truly flavorful stir fry experience that's as healthy as it is delicious. Packed with pieces of carrots, beans, broccoli, baby corn, and bamboo shoots, this versatile mix comes with no added colours, flavours, or preservatives.
Designed for those craving Thai-inspired cuisine, simply drizzle your favourite stir fry sauce over the veggies, add in some strips of meat, and enjoy a quick and simple meal that will have your entire family smiling. For a delicious twist, try making Sweet Thai Chilli Chicken Stir Fry - toss chicken strips in a hot wok with oil until cooked through, add finely chopped garlic and ginger, then mix in our Thai Stir Fry vegetables and a generous splash of sweet chilli sauce. Serve with rice or noodles for a wholesome, satisfying meal that fits effortlessly into your healthy eating plan.

- No added colours, flavours or preservatives
- Perfect for Thai curry and noodle dishes

An Eye for Good, Birds Eye
ingredients: Vegetables (100%) (carrot, green beans, broccoli, baby corn, bamboo shoots).

name: Thai Green Curry
description: THE SPICE TAILOR THAI GREEN CURRY 275G
long_description:
The Spice Tailor's Thai green curry is much loved for its delicious spicy coconut curry with citrusy top notes and herby aromas. Green never tasted so good.

This pack contains a pouch of spices and aromatics, a smaller pouch with our spice paste and a larger one with a coconut sauce.

Spice Routes
A cuisine is a complex tapestry of people geography and history. Early travellers indelibly influenced South East Asian food with their introduction of spices, chillies and curries. New dishes were created and old ones evolved to give us a whole new spectrum of delicious spiced favourites.

At The Spice Tailor, we have been on our own journey down these old spice routes to explore these delicious cuisines. Our old mandate that all our food must taste authentic and be cooked in the same way they are at home still holds. We are really proud to introduce you to our new range of authentic curries!

  • No artificial preservatives, colouring or flavourings!

  • 3 simple steps

  • Ready in 10 mins.

  • Vegetarian Friendly!

  • Restaurant quality in minutes!
ingredients: Coconut Cream (44%), Water, Lemongrass (5%), Galangal Roots (3%), Garlic, Green Chilli, Kaffir Lime Leaves, Sweet Basil (2%), Refined Sunflower Oil, Coriander, Dry Spices, Sugar, Salt, Raw Sugar, Rice Flour, Soya Sauce (Water, SOYABEANS, WHEAT, Salt), Shallot Powder

long_description: Transport yourself to Thailand... in your own kitchen! This Marion's Kitchen cooking kit will help you rustle up a quick and easy pad Thai in minutes. name: Tapioca Starch
long_description: Erawan Tapioca Starch is a kind of gluten free starch that was extracted from Cassava roots. It is widely used in Asian cooking, particularly in Thai cuisine. With its extremely smooth texture, it is widely used as a thickener for sauces and gravies. It is also common to be used in combination with other flours like rice flour to enhance the silkiness and pliability of dough, especially for gluten free recipes.

long_description: We intend to craft crispy seaweed new series with the taste of Korean to satisfy you. We finally selected - Gochujang flavor - Gochujang or Korean red chili paste is the traditional condiment that use in Korean cuisine such as Bibimbap, Tteokbokki, Ssamjang and so on. It's spicy, savory and slightly sweet from the fermentation of soybean, chili powder, glutinous rice, malt powder and salt, this flavor can combine well with our imported seaweed from Korea to give you the tasty taste and aroma in the authentic Korean style.

Enjoy fillets bathed in a rich Thai red curry sauce, made with no added colours, flavours, or preservatives. - No added colours, flavours, or preservatives

name: Korean BBQ Beef
long_description:
This dish features richly seasoned slow-cooked beef mince, marinated in a traditional Korean BBQ sauce, giving it a slightly sweet and delightfully spiced flavour. The slow cooking process tenderises the beef mince, allowing it to fully absorb the marinade, melding the complex flavours, ensuring every bite is juicy and flavourful.
Accompanying the beef is a serving of fluffy, steaming hot rice. This simple yet essential side acts as the perfect canvas to soak up the delicious juices and flavours of the Korean BBQ beef, enhancing the overall dining experience. A sprinkle of bright green peas adds a hint of sweetness and a pop of colour to the dish, providing a fresh contrast to the savoury meat and rice.
Korean BBQ Beef is a vibrant and satisfying meal that's perfect for anyone looking to enjoy a quick and flavourful dinner. It's a must-try dish, effortlessly combining traditional Korean tastes with everyday convenience, making it a hit with both adults and kids alike.
country_of_origin: Made in Australia from at least 40% Australian ingredients with 100% Australian Beef

name: Corn Dogs W Fish Sausage
description: BIBIGO KOREAN STYLE CORN DOGS WITH FISH SAUSAGE 450G
long_description:
Delight your taste buds with bibigo Korean Style Corn Dogs with Fish Sausage, where authentic Korean street food meets irresistible flavour. Each corn dog features a succulent fish sausage, encased in a perfectly golden corn batter that promises a satisfying crunch with every bite.

Experience the perfect balance of textures as you sink your teeth into the crispy exterior, giving way to the deliciously savoury filling inside. The cheesy goodness adds an indulgent twist, elevating this snack to a whole new level of deliciousness.

Preparation is a breeze—heat them in the microwave for a quick, comforting treat, or pop them into an air fryer for an extra crispy finish that will have you coming back for more. Whether you're enjoying them as a snack, party appetizer, or late-night indulgence, these corn dogs bring the exciting flavours of Korean street food right to your kitchen. Treat yourself to this delightful fusion of crunch and savoury goodness, and savour the moment anytime, anywhere!
  • Authentic Korean Flavour

  • Savoury Filling

  • Crispy Texture

  • Convenient Cooking Options

  • Cheesy Goodness

  • Versatile Snack.

  • Easy to Share.

  • Satisfying and Filling.

name: Takeouts Korean Style Frozen Chicken Chunks Ruffle With Sauce
description: TEGEL FROZEN CHICKEN CHUNKS RUFFLE WITH SAUCE 400G
long_description:
• Crispy Korean Style Coating: Paired with a sweet, spicy gochujang sauce.  
  • Ready in as little as 12 Minutes: In the air fryer and oven.
  • Made with 100% New Zealand Chicken Breast.
  • No Added Hormones: Pure, natural goodness.

Like your chicken made with Seoul? Try our Tegel Take Outs Korean Style Chicken. Made with 100% New Zealand chicken breast, finished with a deliciously-crispy coating and paired with a sweet, spicy gochujang sauce. It's all the authenticity of Korean-style chicken all from the comfort of home.

 

Quick and Convenient

Tegel Take Outs Korean Style Chicken is a breeze to prepare, taking as little as 12 minutes in the air fryer or oven. Perfect if you're tight on time, enjoy an delicious, authentic, hassle-free dinner without compromising on taste or quality.

 

Authentic Korean Flavours

Tegel Take Outs Korean Style Chicken brings the best Korean flavours right to your home. Coat them in the provided gochujang sauce and pop them in a burger or bao bun, or simply serve with a side of rice. Dig in!

name: Fried Tofu & Burdock Kimbap
long_description: Kimbap is a Korean rice roll from cooked rice, vegetables, fish, and meat rolled in dried sheets of seaweed. The cooked rice is mixed with sesame oil to give it a fragrant nutty flavour. Bobmoos Fried Tofu and Burdock Kimbap is fast to prepared for a quick meal. Just cut off a corner and microwave in less than 4  minutes. Simple and reliable. A delicious one-dish meal!

name: Jin Ramen Mild 5x120g
description: OTTOGI JIN RAMEN MILD 5 PACK X 120G
long_description: Otoki Jin Ramen - the national ramen that has been loved for over 30 years, has gained popularity not only in South Korea but also internationally, thanks to its high-quality ingredients, authentic Korean flavors, and easy preparation method. With its signature mild taste, Otoki Jin Ramen satisfies cravings without overwhelming spice, making it perfect for those who prefer a milder kick. Each bite is a harmonious blend of savory broth, chewy noodles, and a tantalizing medley of traditional Korean spices, creating a culinary experience that's simply irresistible. It is easy-to-prepare format, you can enjoy restaurant-quality ramen in the comfort of your own home. Otoki Jin Ramen can be served with any ingredients such as green onions, eggs, kimchi and dumpling. It is delicious to eat with anyone, anytime and anywhere.The rich beef and bone broth-based soup has a light charm, making it a taste that keeps you coming back for more.

name: Jin Ramen Spicy 5x120g
description: OTTOGI JIN RAMEN SPICY 5 PACK X 120G
long_description: Otoki Jin Ramen - the national ramen that has been loved for over 30 years, has gained popularity not only in South Korea but also internationally, thanks to its high-quality ingredients, authentic Korean flavors, and easy preparation method. With its signature mild taste, Otoki Jin Ramen satisfies cravings without overwhelming spice, making it perfect for those who prefer a milder kick. Each bite is a harmonious blend of savory broth, chewy noodles, and a tantalizing medley of traditional Korean spices, creating a culinary experience that's simply irresistible. It is easy-to-prepare format, you can enjoy restaurant-quality ramen in the comfort of your own home. Otoki Jin Ramen can be served with any ingredients such as green onions, eggs, kimchi and dumpling. It is delicious to eat with anyone, anytime and anywhere. The rich beef and bone broth-based soup has a light charm, making it a taste that keeps you coming back for more.

name: Buldak Spicy Dumpling Original
description: SAMYANG BULDAK HOT CHICKEN DUMPLING ORIGINAL 280G
long_description: "Notorious for its burning heat, Samyang's Hot Chicken range introduces the Buldak Dumpling for those who would like to try something different. With traditional Korean fillings such as vermicelli, tofu, cabbage, onion, spring onion, radish, etc. yet marinated with the famous hot chicken sauce, the Buldak Dumpling offers a delicious yet healthy meal solution!Can be pan-fried, boiled, steamed, paired with ramen, rice cake soup and more!"
